title: Trailers Vision
description: Turn your game into a living Minecraft trailer!
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae6889173940090b2024df929fe1ee9ba8f647f1.png)
![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ad6342682c7651391accf346176be2833401fc3.png) Ever wished your Minecraft world could look as breathtaking as Minecraft trailers? Look no further! With Trailers Vision, we've meticulously crafted a resource pack that transforms your Minecraft experience to look like Minecraft trailers. We watched every single Minecraft trailer carefully and brought this texture pack for you! Not just for a single edition, Trailers Vision is available for both Bedrock and Java Editions. Whether you prefer to explore this texture pack on your mobile device or your PC, we've got you covered! *Shader in the screenshots is BSL Shaders
![cont](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89742b4385d5f15d4d541863b68a0d9a3b13f05c.png) - DiamondIsntHere - Roxtro ![characters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/490eb6093111755a5354e977e9972e2731111711_0.webp)
![imp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9205c128b024e0fb7943fee263603b00d67088b8.png) **This is NOT "Bare Bones" texture pack.** **This texture pack is not affiliated with Mojang AB.** **Sources:** >Minecraft trailers >Minecraft live videos >Minecraft official posts and covers
